---
title: "Catchments (Q + T joined to COMID, stream order >= 4)"
output: html_document
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

STEP 4 of the pipeline (runs after Watertemp.Rmd).

Purpose
-------
Build the NHDPlus HR routing layer for the AOI (flowlines + catchments),
snap every USGS site that appears in the Q+T table to a COMID, and filter
everything to stream order >= 4 in one pass. No duplicated full-basin
layers are persisted.

Final outputs (single version of each — these ARE the SO>=4 layers):
  - `nhd_dir/flowlines.gpkg`          : NHDPlus HR flowlines, SO >= 4, clipped to AOI
  - `nhd_dir/catchments.gpkg`         : matching catchment polygons (same COMIDs)
  - `daily_drivers_dir/q_t_comid.parquet` : Q + T daily obs joined to COMID, SO >= 4
  - `shape_dir/sites_with_comid.csv`  : site_no -> comid lookup for provenance

```{r setup}
source("SRC/Functions_Paths.R")

library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(arrow)
library(dataRetrieval)
library(nhdplusTools)

sf::sf_use_s2(FALSE)
```

```{r aoi}
# AOI from Boundaries.py
aoi <- st_read(basin_shp, quiet = TRUE) %>%
  st_transform(4326) %>%
  st_make_valid()
```

```{r nhd-hr-download}
# Illinois basin = HU4 0712 + 0713
hu4s        <- c("0712", "0713")
hr_data_dir <- file.path(nhd_dir, "hr_raw")
hr_gpkg     <- file.path(nhd_dir, "nhdplushr.gpkg")

dir.create(hr_data_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

download_nhdplushr(hr_data_dir, hu4s)

hr <- get_nhdplushr(
  hr_data_dir,
  layers   = c("NHDFlowline", "NHDPlusCatchment"),
  out_gpkg = hr_gpkg
)
```

```{r flowlines-catchments}
# HR flowlines clipped to AOI, renamed to lowercase to match the rest of the pipeline
flowlines <- hr$NHDFlowline %>%
  st_as_sf() %>%
  st_transform(4326) %>%
  rename(
    comid      = COMID,
    reachcode  = REACHCODE,
    gnis_name  = GNIS_Name,
    lengthkm   = LENGTHKM,
    areasqkm   = TotDASqKM,
    slope      = Slope,
    streamorde = StreamOrde,
    streamcalc = StreamCalc,
    hydroseq   = Hydroseq,
    levelpathi = LevelPathI,
    fromnode   = FromNode,
    tonode     = ToNode,
    terminalfl = TerminalFl,
    startflag  = StartFlag,
    divergence = Divergence
  ) %>%
  select(comid, reachcode, gnis_name, lengthkm, areasqkm, slope,
         streamorde, streamcalc, hydroseq, levelpathi,
         fromnode, tonode, terminalfl, startflag, divergence) %>%
  st_intersection(aoi)

catchments <- hr$NHDPlusCatchment %>%
  st_as_sf(sf_column_name = "geom") %>%
  st_transform(4326) %>%
  st_make_valid() %>%
  mutate(comid = as.character(FEATUREID)) %>%
  rename(areasqkm = AreaSqKM) %>%
  select(comid, areasqkm) %>%
  st_intersection(aoi)
```

```{r orphan-check}
orphans <- flowlines %>%
  filter(is.na(fromnode) | is.na(tonode)) %>%
  pull(comid)

if (length(orphans) > 0) {
  warning("Orphan COMIDs found: ", paste(orphans, collapse = ", "))
} else {
  message("All COMIDs routable (no orphan edges).")
}
```


```{r load and snap-sites-to-comid}

# Load Q+T
# Load Q+T
q_t <- read_parquet(file.path(daily_drivers_dir, "q_t.parquet")) %>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(Date))

site_ids <- paste0("USGS-", unique(q_t$site_no))

# Batch into groups of 50
batch_size <- 50
batches <- split(site_ids, ceiling(seq_along(site_ids) / batch_size))

site_info_raw <- purrr::map(batches, function(batch) {
  Sys.sleep(0.5)
  result <- read_waterdata_monitoring_location(
    monitoring_location_id = batch,
    skipGeometry           = FALSE
  )

  coords <- st_coordinates(result)

  result %>%
    st_drop_geometry() %>%
    mutate(
      across(everything(), as.character),
      longitude = coords[, 1],
      latitude  = coords[, 2]
    )
})

# Keep only sites within the AOI
# Build sf points
site_coords_all <- bind_rows(site_info_raw) %>%
  filter(!is.na(longitude), !is.na(latitude)) %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = 4326) %>%
  st_transform(4326) %>%
  mutate(site_no = gsub("^USGS-", "", monitoring_location_id))
```

```{r snap-sites-to-comid}
# Primary snap: nearest flowline with VAA measures (uses full network so small
# tributaries don't get misrouted to a mainstem reach).
vaa <- get_vaa() %>% select(comid, frommeas, tomeas)

flowlines_idx <- flowlines %>%
  mutate(comid = as.character(comid)) %>%
  left_join(vaa, by = "comid") %>%
  rename(
    FromMeas = frommeas,
    ToMeas   = tomeas
  )

# Snap sites to flowlines
site_matches <- get_flowline_index(
  flowlines_idx,
  site_coords,
  search_radius = 50
)

sites_with_comid_sf <- site_coords %>%
  mutate(comid = as.character(site_matches$COMID)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(comid))

# Compute snap distance from each site to its assigned flowline
flow_match <- flowlines %>%
  mutate(comid = as.character(comid))

matched_lines <- flow_match[match(sites_with_comid_sf$comid, flow_match$comid), ]

snap_dist_m <- st_distance(
  st_transform(sites_with_comid_sf, 5070),
  st_transform(matched_lines, 5070),
  by_element = TRUE
)

sites_with_comid_sf <- sites_with_comid_sf %>%
  mutate(snap_dist_m = as.numeric(snap_dist_m))

cat("\nSnap distance summary (meters):\n")
print(summary(sites_with_comid_sf$snap_dist_m))

# Keep only defensible direct matches
snap_dist_threshold_m <- 250

sites_with_comid_sf <- sites_with_comid_sf %>%
  filter(snap_dist_m <= snap_dist_threshold_m)

cat("Sites retained after snap-distance filter:", nrow(sites_with_comid_sf), "\n")

# Optional: inspect excluded sites
sites_excluded_bad_snap <- site_coords %>%
  left_join(
    sites_with_comid_sf %>%
      st_drop_geometry() %>%
      select(site_no, comid, snap_dist_m),
    by = "site_no"
  ) %>%
  filter(is.na(comid))

cat("Sites excluded for missing/poor COMID match:", nrow(sites_excluded_bad_snap), "\n")

# Final lookup used downstream
sites_with_comid <- sites_with_comid_sf %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  select(site_no, comid)

write.csv(
  sites_with_comid,
  file.path(shape_dir, "sites_with_comid.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

```{r join-and-filter-so4}
# Attach stream order onto Q+T via COMID, then filter Q+T and hydro layers
# to stream order >= 4 in one consistent pass.
flow_attrs <- flowlines %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  mutate(comid = as.character(comid)) %>%
  select(comid, streamorde)

q_t_comid <- q_t %>%
  left_join(sites_with_comid, by = "site_no") %>%
  filter(!is.na(comid)) %>%
  mutate(comid = as.character(comid)) %>%
  left_join(flow_attrs, by = "comid") %>%
  filter(!is.na(streamorde), streamorde >= 4)%>%
  group_by(site_no) %>%
  filter(any(!is.na(q_m3s) | !is.na(water_temp_C))) %>%
  ungroup()

# Unique Q and T sensors by stream order (after SO >= 4 filter)
sensor_counts_by_order <- q_t_comid %>%
  group_by(streamorde) %>%
  summarise(
    n_q_sensors = n_distinct(site_no[!is.na(q_m3s)]),
    n_t_sensors = n_distinct(site_no[!is.na(water_temp_C)]),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(streamorde)

cat("\nUnique sensors by stream order:\n")
print(sensor_counts_by_order)

flowlines <- flowlines %>% filter(!is.na(streamorde), streamorde >= 4)

keep_comids <- unique(as.character(flowlines$comid))
catchments  <- catchments %>%
  mutate(comid = as.character(comid)) %>%
  filter(comid %in% keep_comids)
```

```{r}
# Stream order breakdown of unique Q and T sensors
q_sensor_counts <- q_t_comid %>%
  filter(!is.na(streamorde), !is.na(q_m3s)) %>%
  distinct(streamorde, site_no) %>%
  count(streamorde, name = "n_q_sensors") %>%
  arrange(streamorde)

t_sensor_counts <- q_t_comid %>%
  filter(!is.na(streamorde), !is.na(water_temp_C)) %>%
  distinct(streamorde, site_no) %>%
  count(streamorde, name = "n_t_sensors") %>%
  arrange(streamorde)

sensor_counts_by_order <- full_join(q_sensor_counts, t_sensor_counts, by = "streamorde") %>%
  arrange(streamorde)

cat("\nUnique sensors by stream order:\n")
print(sensor_counts_by_order)
```


```{r write-final-outputs}
flowline_out  <- file.path(nhd_dir, "flowlines.gpkg")
catchment_out <- file.path(nhd_dir, "catchments.gpkg")
q_t_comid_out <- file.path(daily_drivers_dir, "q_t_comid.parquet")

for (f in c(flowline_out, catchment_out, q_t_comid_out)) {
  if (file.exists(f)) file.remove(f)
}

st_write(flowlines,  flowline_out,  quiet = TRUE)
st_write(catchments, catchment_out, quiet = TRUE)
write_parquet(q_t_comid, q_t_comid_out)

cat("\nFinal Q+T+COMID (stream order >= 4):\n")
print(q_t_comid %>% summarise(
  n_rows          = n(),
  n_sites         = n_distinct(site_no),
  n_comids        = n_distinct(comid),
  min_date        = min(Date, na.rm = TRUE),
  max_date        = max(Date, na.rm = TRUE),
  pct_rows_with_Q = mean(!is.na(q_m3s)),
  pct_rows_with_T = mean(!is.na(water_temp_C))
))
```

The following is to assess why there are so many stream order 1 sites

```{r}
# One row per site with assigned COMID + stream order
site_stream_order <- q_t %>%
  distinct(site_no) %>%
  left_join(sites_with_comid, by = "site_no") %>%
  filter(!is.na(comid)) %>%
  mutate(comid = as.character(comid)) %>%
  left_join(flow_attrs, by = "comid") %>%
  distinct(site_no, comid, streamorde)

# Quick diagnostic table
site_stream_order %>%
  count(streamorde, name = "n_sites") %>%
  arrange(streamorde) %>%
  print()
```

```{r}
# Rebuild an sf version of sites with stream order attached
# Sites map, zoomed to AOI
site_points_map <- site_coords %>%
  left_join(site_stream_order, by = "site_no")

aoi_bbox <- st_bbox(aoi)

par(mar = c(0.2, 0.2, 0.2, 0.2), xaxs = "i", yaxs = "i")

plot(
  st_geometry(aoi),
  col = "grey95",
  border = "black",
  xlim = c(aoi_bbox["xmin"], aoi_bbox["xmax"]),
  ylim = c(aoi_bbox["ymin"], aoi_bbox["ymax"]),
  asp  = 1
)

plot(
  st_geometry(flowlines),
  col = "grey70",
  lwd = 0.4,
  add = TRUE
)

plot(
  st_geometry(site_points_map),
  col = "red",
  pch = 16,
  cex = 0.35,
  add = TRUE
)
```
